synthesis_text: Individuals should consider getting tested for COVID-19 if they exhibit symptoms of the illness, such as fever, cough, or shortness of breath, to confirm infection [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00079]. Testing is also essential for those who believe they may be infected [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00194]. Additionally, it is advised to test five days after coming into contact with someone who has COVID-19 [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023]. Children with symptoms should seek medical care and consider getting tested [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00021]. Fully vaccinated individuals showing symptoms should contact their doctor about testing [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00013].

Individuals should consider getting tested for COVID-19 if they have symptoms of the illness, as testing is essential for those who believe they may be infected [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023]. Additionally, it is advised to test five days after coming into contact with the virus [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023]. Children with symptoms should also seek medical care and consider getting tested [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023].

Individuals should consider getting tested for COVID-19 if they exhibit symptoms of the illness, as testing is essential to confirm infection [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]. This includes contacting a doctor about testing if they are fully vaccinated and showing symptoms [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00013]. Children with symptoms should also seek medical care and consider getting tested [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00021].
